feed.title: kansascitybankruptcy.org -- Bankruptcy Information
feed.subtitle: Free bankruptcy information and guides from the Open Bankruptcy Project

entry.title: Kansas City Bankruptcy -- Chapter 7 & 13 Filing Guide [2026]
entry.summary: Free Kansas City bankruptcy guide for 2026. Compare Chapter 7 vs Chapter 13, Missouri and Kansas exemptions, filing costs, means test, and what to expect. 91,000+ local cases analyzed.

entry.title: Your 341 Meeting in Kansas City: What to Expect
entry.summary: Everything you need to know about your 341 meeting of creditors in Kansas City. Locations, what to bring, common questions, how long it takes, and.

entry.title: The Automatic Stay in Kansas City Bankruptcy
entry.summary: Learn how the automatic stay protects Kansas City residents when filing bankruptcy.

entry.title: Bank Accounts and Bankruptcy in Kansas City -- Freezes, Exemptions, New Accounts
entry.summary: Can creditors freeze your bank account in bankruptcy? Exempting bank funds in MO vs KS. Opening a new account after filing.

entry.title: Can I Buy a Car While in Chapter 13? -- Kansas City
entry.summary: You need trustee approval and a court motion to purchase a vehicle during Chapter 13. [Kansas City]

entry.title: Buying a House After Bankruptcy in Kansas City -- FHA, VA, Conventional Waiting Periods
entry.summary: When can you buy a house after bankruptcy in Kansas City? FHA (2 years Ch 7, 1 year Ch 13), VA (2 years), conventional (4 years Ch 7).

entry.title: Car Leases and Bankruptcy -- Kansas City
entry.summary: You have 60 days after filing to decide whether to assume (keep) or reject (surrender) your car lease. [Kansas City]

entry.title: Chapter 11 Bankruptcy in Kansas City -- Small Business Reorganization Guide
entry.summary: Complete guide to Chapter 11 bankruptcy for Kansas City small businesses. Covers Subchapter V, debtor in possession, plan confirmation, 1191(a) vs.

entry.title: Chapter 13 Eligibility in Kansas City -- Debt Limits, Income, Prior Filing Bars
entry.summary: Who qualifies for Chapter 13 bankruptcy in Kansas City? Debt limits ($2.75M), regular income requirement, prior filing bars, and disposable income rules.

entry.title: Chapter 13 Payment Plans in Kansas City -- How Payments Work, Trustee Info, Modifications
entry.summary: How Chapter 13 payments work in Kansas City. Disposable income test, W.D. Mo. and D. Kan. trustee info, TFS payments, plan modifications.
